title: mammillaria columbiana subsp. ruestii
intro: Mammillaria columbiana subsp. ruestii, also known as the Mammillaria ruestii, is a subspecies of cactus native to Mexico, belonging to the family Cactaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mammillaria ruestii include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
